历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 6023, in 2023 approximately 7695 (shifted back by about 1672), in 2024 approximately 6814 (shifted forward by about 881), and in 2025 the lowest rank for the new Gaokao physics category was approximately 3636 (shifted forward by about 3178). The significant forward shift in 2025 is related to the change in subject classification in Sichuan's first year of the new Gaokao, with a baseline rank of about 3636. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's science group: 63 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 72 in 2024, 87 in 2025 (physics category), and 80 planned for 2026, a reduction of 7 (about -8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a campus of HIT. On the Soft Science ranking, referencing HIT's main campus, it ranked 12th in 2026 (Top 20), indicating an extremely high school level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin heat is high (HIT ranks 10th overall), with large short video exposure and relatively high application attention. In 2024, there were discussions about a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but the rank has significantly recovered in 2025. Relying on HIT's main campus A+ disciplines (Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering) and A-class disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.), its engineering strength is top-notch, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity/recommendation. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Sichuan Province for 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.6% from 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. HIT (Weihai) is located in Shandong, not a local university in Sichuan, and recruits across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 3636, the reduction of 7 students (-8%) in 2026, the significant increase in physics category candidates in Sichuan (+15.6%), and the multiple factors of the university's high reputation and high popularity of engineering majors: the reduction in enrollment makes the rank number smaller (easier to enter), but the large increase in candidates intensifies competition (rank number increases), with the two directions opposite and the candidate growth rate greater than the enrollment reduction rate. Meanwhile, the university's high reputation and popular engineering majors continue to attract high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the lowest rank for 2026 will be approximately 3491, with a range of 3072–3910.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class/Future Information): Covers Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class): Covers Robot Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science-Engineering Cross Excellent Talent Plan): Includes Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Plan): Includes Robot Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, etc.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Plan): Includes Materials Science and Engineering, Welding Technology and Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (enrolled in 2022, not separately listed in the 2026 plan)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 3072–3910, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 Excellent Talent Plans, with Tier 1 Top Classes/Leading Classes as reach options (requiring a rank significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. HIT (Weihai) has outstanding engineering strength, and majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation offer broad employment prospects, making it worth serious consideration.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 2147, in 2024 approximately 1657 (moving forward by about 490), and in 2025, under the new Gaokao, the minimum rank for history category was approximately 1865 (moving backward by about 208). Over the past three years, the rank fluctuated between 1657 and 2147, with a baseline of about 1865 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's liberal arts group: 10 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 8 in 2025 (history category), and 8 in 2026, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. According to the Soft Science ranking, the main campus of HIT is ranked 12th in 2026, indicating a very high university level. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed. It has high popularity on Douyin (TikTok). No obvious abnormal signals in application submissions. The liberal arts only offer the Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Accounting), relying on HIT's strong disciplines of Management Science and Engineering (A) and Business Administration (A-), with relatively strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of accounting/finance/auditing majors in 2024 is recommended (slightly hot), with a stable trend in 2025. The estimated number of history category examinees in Sichuan in 2026 is about 206,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 178,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. HIT (Weihai) is located in Shandong, not a local university in this province, so it involves cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline rank of 1865 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase in history category examinees in Sichuan (+15.6%), and the high reputation of the university: the unchanged plan does not alter the competitive landscape, but the large increase in examinees intensifies competition (rank number increases), while the 985 level and high reputation still strongly attract liberal arts examinees. It is predicted that the minimum rank in 2026 will be approximately 1890, with a range of 1663 to 2117.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including: Accounting)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts only offer one enrollment major, the Economics and Management Experimental Class (Accounting direction). Candidates with ranks within the predicted range of 1663 to 2117 can all attempt to apply. The accounting major offers stable employment and clear advantages for civil service exams. Combined with HIT's 985 platform, it offers high cost-effectiveness. It is recommended that candidates with ranks better than the upper limit of the range can confidently apply, while those with ranks near the lower limit should be cautious.
